location: Guaranteed drop from defeating Commander O'Neil, a field boss found in a large clearing within the Swamp of Aeonia in eastern Caelid, just south of the Inner Aeonia Site of Grace.
tactics: Head south from Inner Aeonia grace into the swamp clearing — scarlet rot buildup from standing in the swamp is as dangerous as the fight itself, so watch your rot meter or bring resistance.
O'Neil is a large armored halberd-wielder; give him space and watch for his wide sweeping swings and jumping slam.
The summon sign for the friendly NPC Polyanna, Adopted Daughter appears near Inner Aeonia grace and can help with this fight.
Guaranteed, one-time drop — no farming needed.
lore: A weathered halberd with a tattered red battle standard tied around it. Even after the lord he served fled, Commander O'Neil kept raising this flag over the rot-eaten battlefield, the last soldier still honoring a fight everyone else abandoned.

builds.name: Strength Halberd with party buff
builds.why: D/D Strength-Dexterity scaling plus the Rallying Standard skill (attack and defense buff for self and nearby allies) make it strong for co-op or summon-heavy builds.
